title: Amit Tiwari
description: Join us as we award full scholarships to 150 orphaned children for the academic year 2025-26. Chief Guest: HRD Ministry Officials. Open to all supporters.

title: Mega Meal Distribution – Independence Day
description: On Independence Day, we will serve 10,000 meals to underprivileged families simultaneously across 100+ villages. Volunteer slots are open!

title: Career Mentorship Bootcamp – NEET/JEE
description: A 3-day intensive bootcamp for village students appearing for NEET/JEE 2026. Mentored by IIT & AIIMS alumni. Free registration for all rural students.

title: Fundraising Gala Dinner
description: A special evening to celebrate our 7th anniversary and raise funds for our 2026 expansion. Performance by renowned artists. Table bookings open.
